Detailed Analysis: 用户极度看重底部的储物柜设计，认为这为现代小户型提供了极佳的收纳方案。
Original Quote: I like the storage on both side and the colour is very nice it is so modern...

Detailed Analysis: 能够从4人座扩展至12人座是该产品的杀手级卖点，完美适配家庭聚会需求。
Original Quote: This table extends from a comfortable 4-seater to a 12-seater... the only table I found that offered that range.

Detailed Analysis: 产品外观设计符合现代审美，尤其是“现代且柔和”的视觉效果是用户下单的主因。
Original Quote: Modern, soft look, I love it!
column5: "It is so pretty love it... it is so modern"

Detailed Analysis: 配送顺畅及送货上门组装服务显著提升了用户满意度和品牌信任感。
Original Quote: The delivery process is smooth and they assemble it for me.

Dimension: 低分/中评：弃购与不满诱因
Detailed Analysis: 售价接近2000美金，但用户发现并非纯实木，且表面材质极易刮花，导致性价比感知降低。
Original Quote: found the quality lacking for a 2000 table

Dimension: 低分/中评：弃购与不满诱因
Detailed Analysis: 零部件（如面板转角、柜门）在运输途中频繁出现裂纹或凹痕，是退货和差评的首要原因。
Original Quote: One of the pieces arrived cracked
column5: "Damaged from delivery. Returning the table today."

Dimension: 低分/中评：弃购与不满诱因
Detailed Analysis: 网页图片与实物存在色差，实物色调偏暖/偏橘，对追求特定装修风格的用户构成困扰。
Original Quote: agree with comments on the orange tone
column5: "color is different from some pictures. It’s warm..."

Dimension: 低分/中评：弃购与不满诱因
Detailed Analysis: 部分产品存在预钻孔位不准的问题，导致柜门安装困难或螺丝无法固定。
Original Quote: issues when installing the doors. You can tell where the holes were drilled multiple times...
